probes.name: create_event_with_all_details
probes.prompt: Hey, can you create a calendar event for my thesis defense rehearsal? It should be on June 15th 2026 at 14:00, duration 2 hours, title 'Thesis Defense Rehearsal - Closed-Loop Analysis', location at the university. Before adding it please check if I have any conflicting events, todos or habits around that time.
probes.criteria:
The agent acts as a calendar manager for Twily's calendar. A GOOD response: (1) checks existing events, todos, goals and habits for conflicts around June 15 14:00–16:00 before creating, (2) creates the event with all specified fields (title, date, time, duration, location), (3) confirms what was created or reports any conflicts found.
Score 0.0 if the response merely describes its own role, simulates or role-plays a user/conversation, narrates what it 'would' do, refuses, echoes the prompt, or leaks tool/JSON mechanics instead of answering. Reward a concrete, correct, on-task result a user could use as-is.
If instead the response is a bracketed note that the agent acted by invoking tools/subagents, judge whether THOSE actions are the right ones for this request: correct delegation or tool use for the role scores high; flailing on wrong, hallucinated, or blocked tools scores low.
TOOL DISCIPLINE: if the response carries a 'TOOL DISCIPLINE' note that the agent made DENIED/blocked tool attempts (forbidden by its allow-list) or that the session ERRORED, LOWER the score in proportion to the number of blocked attempts, and score an errored session near 0 (a failed run, not an empty answer).
probes.source_hint: Inspired by messages 3 (reschedule/calendar access), 6 (add task to calendar), and 27 (thesis defense context).

probes.name: check_availability_next_week
probes.prompt: Can you check my availability for next week? I need to find two 1.5-hour slots for working on my tax documents — I got a message that I'm missing PPE 12/25 payment on my statement and need to download settlement details from PUE ZUS. Prefer mornings if possible. Also tell me what events I already have booked so I can plan around them.
probes.criteria:
The agent acts as a calendar manager. A GOOD response: (1) retrieves all events for next week and presents them clearly, (2) identifies at least two free 1.5-hour morning slots, (3) explicitly cross-references existing commitments to justify its recommendations.

probes.name: reschedule_existing_event
probes.prompt: I need to reschedule my meeting with Emiteo about the share emission cooperation offer. It was supposed to be this Friday but something came up. Can you move it to the following Monday or Tuesday afternoon? Check my calendar first and pick whichever day has fewer things scheduled. The event title should stay the same: 'Spotkanie Emiteo - oferta współpracy (emisja akcji)'.
probes.criteria:
The agent acts as a calendar manager. A GOOD response: (1) locates the existing event by name, (2) checks availability on both Monday and Tuesday afternoons, (3) selects the less busy day with justification, (4) reschedules the event and confirms the new time, (5) checks for conflicts with todos/goals/habits on the new slot.

probes.name: add_daily_habit_to_calendar
probes.prompt: Dodaj mi do kalendarza codzienne przypomnienie o treningu na najbliższe 4 tygodnie, od jutra rano. Ustaw to na 7:30, nazwij 'Morning Workout Plan'. Zanim dodasz, sprawdź czy nie mam czegoś zaplanowanego o tej porze, bo chyba miałem tam jakiś task o analizie danych. Jak jest konflikt to mi powiedz i nie dubluj, tylko zaproponuj inny czas.
probes.criteria:
The agent acts as a calendar manager. A GOOD response: (1) checks existing events/todos/habits at 7:30 for the next 4 weeks before creating, (2) if conflict found, reports it and suggests alternative time, (3) if no conflict, creates a daily recurring event titled 'Morning Workout Plan' at 7:30 for 4 weeks, (4) responds in Polish since the request was in Polish.

probes.name: view_and_align_schedule_with_goals
probes.prompt: What does my calendar look like for the rest of this week? Show me everything that's scheduled. I want to make sure my time blocks are actually aligned with my priorities — specifically, I have a goal to finish analyzing dissonance between priorities and real actions, and I want to see if I've allocated enough time for that. If there are any obvious gaps or misalignments, flag them.
probes.criteria:
The agent acts as a calendar manager that cross-references goals/habits/todos. A GOOD response: (1) lists all remaining events for this week with times and titles, (2) checks goals and todos to see if time is allocated for the stated priority ('analyzing dissonance between priorities and real actions'), (3) identifies gaps or misalignments between the schedule and stated goals, (4) provides actionable suggestions.
